title: Magic Mop Flat Sponge Refill Absorbent With Non-Scratch Scourer Head 3d Floor Cleaning Pad Replacement

description: Brand Vileda Product code 110620. Replacement mop head for the Vileda Magic Mop Flat Made of absorbent sponge with a 3D grooved surface for better cleaning performance. Scratchresistant scrubbing edge helps remove stubborn stains. To remove the mop head, use the grey clips to release the sponge from the red mop head. Simply snap back into place to replace. The 3D grooved foam head cleans floors more effectively, while the flat head makes it ideal for cleaning larger floor areas. The scratchresistant scrubbing edge allows for easy removal of stubborn stains. Only compatible with the Vileda Magic Mop Flat.
